description_long: This is a two-tiered cake with a whimsical woodland theme, featuring a smooth, pastel pink upper tier and a lower tier textured to resemble tree bark. Atop the cake sits a stylized deer figurine adorned with a flower crown, exuding a gentle, peaceful expression. The base of the cake is decorated with large, sculpted flowers, green leaves, and small animal figurines including a rabbit, fox, and another deer, all with matching floral crowns. The cake is presented on a large, green, polygonal board that mimics a grassy clearing, scattered with small pastel flowers. The overall design is playful and detailed, with a focus on natural and floral elements. The cake appears to be made primarily of fondant and cake, with intricate edible decorations.
description: A two-tiered woodland-themed cake with a deer topper, floral decorations, and small animal figurines, set on a green board resembling grass. The cake features pastel colors and detailed fondant work.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deer topper, floral arrangements, and three animal figurines at the base.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the deer topper and the arrangement of flowers and leaves, with fewer animal figurines visible.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the deer topper and the leafy decorations, with the cake's bark-like texture prominent.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the deer topper's face, floral accents, and a partial view of the animal figurines at the base.
